field.name: Eridanus-South pilot
field.notes: KiDS-South footprint, VLT-accessible (altitude > 30 deg from Paranal), minimal SDSS coverage — use SIMBAD/NED/VizieR as primary catalogs

redshift.z_floor_reason: Below z=0.15, LyC (912 Å) redshifts to <1049 Å, below HST/COS G130M sensitivity and contaminated by geocoronal Lyman-alpha

science_goal: Compact star-forming green pea / LyC leaker candidates with high [OIII]/[OII] ratio, suitable for HST/COS LyC detection and VLT/MUSE IFU characterization
literature_focus: Lyman continuum leaker, LyC escape, green pea galaxy, compact star-forming, ionizing photon escape fraction, [OIII]/[OII] ratio, HST COS ultraviolet, LyC detection southern
catalog_notes: SDSS coverage sparse below Dec=-10; prefer SIMBAD, NED, VizieR (2dFGRS J/MNRAS/328/1039 or GAMA). Flag any SDSS sources as bonus, not primary.
